1.title: Brushing Your Teeth
1.passage: Tom is brushing his teeth. He brushes his teeth every morning. He brushes his teeth every day to keep them clean and healthy.
1.translation: 湯姆正在刷牙。他每天早上刷牙。他每天刷牙，以保持牙齒的清潔與健康。

advanced.eg: There are several toothbrushes in the cup on the shelf.
advanced.eg_zh: 架上的杯子裡有好幾把牙刷。

advanced.eg: Mary is squeezing some toothpaste onto her toothbrush.
advanced.eg_zh: 瑪麗正將一些牙膏擠到她的牙刷上。

advanced.eg: Brushing your teeth can help to prevent cavities.
advanced.eg_zh: 刷牙有助於預防蛀牙。

advanced.eg: I hate going to the dentist.
advanced.eg_zh: 我很討厭去看牙醫。

advanced.eg: The toothpaste is on the sink next to the tap.
advanced.eg_zh: 牙膏在洗手槽的水龍頭旁邊。

1.title: Washing Your Face
1.passage: Tom is going to wash his face. He washes his face every day. He rinses off his facecloth with warm water. Then he wipes his face until it is clean.
1.translation: 湯姆正準備要洗臉。他每天都會洗臉。他用溫水沖洗毛巾，然後他擦拭他的臉，直到乾淨為止。

advanced.eg: He wrings the wet facecloth out.
advanced.eg_zh: 他把濕毛巾擰乾。

advanced.eg: Dry your hands with a clean towel.
advanced.eg_zh: 用一條乾淨的毛巾將你的手擦乾。

advanced.eg: Carol washes her face with soap and water.
advanced.eg_zh: 卡蘿用香皂和水來洗臉。

advanced.eg: She splashes water onto her face.
advanced.eg_zh: 她把水潑到她的臉上。

advanced.eg: Hang up the towel when you’re finished.
advanced.eg_zh: 當你用完時，請將毛巾掛好。

1.title: Eating Breakfast
1.passage: It is breakfast time. Sophia puts two slices of bread into the toaster. Then she pushes the handle down. When the toast is ready, it will pop up.
1.translation: 現在是早餐時間。蘇菲亞將兩片麵包放到烤麵包機，然後她把拉柄往下按。當土司烤好的時候，它就會彈跳出來。

advanced.eg: She spreads some strawberry jam on the toast with a knife.
advanced.eg_zh: 她用刀子將一些草莓果醬塗在土司上面。

advanced.eg: Egg sandwiches and breakfast burgers are popular breakfast foods in Taiwan.
advanced.eg_zh: 在台灣，夾蛋三明治與早餐漢堡是很受歡迎的早餐食物。

advanced.eg: There is a breakfast shop on the corner.
advanced.eg_zh: 在轉角的地方，有一家早餐店。

advanced.eg: Let’s buy some cereal and milk for breakfast.
advanced.eg_zh: 讓我們買一些麥片和牛奶當早餐。

advanced.eg: Eric likes to eat congee for breakfast.
advanced.eg_zh: 艾瑞克早餐喜歡吃粥。

1.title: Preparing for School
1.passage: It is morning and Cindy is getting ready for school. She packs her books into her backpack. The backpack is heavy, but she has everything she needs for the day.
1.translation: 現在是早晨時間，辛蒂正準備要上學。她將書裝進她的背包。背包很重，但是她有今天所需要的每樣東西。

advanced.eg: Mark puts his pencil case into his school bag.
advanced.eg_zh: 馬克把他的鉛筆盒放進他的書包。

advanced.eg: Cindy slings the backpack over her shoulder.
advanced.eg_zh: 辛蒂將背包掛在肩膀上。

advanced.eg: Ted hates to carry his book bag around.
advanced.eg_zh: 泰德很討厭背著書包到處走。

advanced.eg: Tom’s book bag is full of comic books.
advanced.eg_zh: 湯姆的書包裝滿了漫畫書。

advanced.eg: Every morning, Lucy prepares for school.
advanced.eg_zh: 每天早上，露西都要做好上學的準備。

1.title: Wiping off the Chalkboard
1.passage: It is recess. Carl is wiping off the chalkboard with an eraser. He likes to erase the board to help his teacher.
1.translation: 現在是下課時間。卡爾正用板擦在擦黑板。他喜歡幫他的老師擦黑板。

advanced.eg: The boy cleans the chalkboard eraser by hitting it with a stick.
advanced.eg_zh: 這個男孩用一根棍子打板擦，以便把它清理乾淨。

advanced.eg: My teacher always has chalk dust on his clothes.
advanced.eg_zh: 我的老師衣服上總是有粉筆灰。

advanced.eg: Teachers can write words on the board for students to copy.
advanced.eg_zh: 老師可以在黑板上寫字詞讓學生抄寫。

advanced.eg: Chalk dust makes me sneeze.
advanced.eg_zh: 粉筆灰使我打噴嚏。

advanced.eg: Whiteboards have replaced chalkboards in many classrooms.
advanced.eg_zh: 很多教室裡，白板已經取代了黑板。

1.title: Taking a Test
1.passage: Wendy is a good student. She is focusing on her paper. She is trying to figure out a math problem. It takes her about 5 minutes to solve the problem.
1.translation: 溫蒂是個好學生。她正專注在她的考卷上。她試著要解出一題數學題。算這道題目大約要花她五分鐘的時間。

advanced.eg: She hands her paper in to the teacher for correcting.
advanced.eg_zh: 她把她的考卷交給老師批改。

advanced.eg: The teacher goes over every question on the exam and marks the mistakes.
advanced.eg_zh: 老師看過考試卷上的每道題目，並標出錯誤的地方。

advanced.eg: Some mistakes are circled and others are crossed out.
advanced.eg_zh: 有些錯誤被圈起來，而有些錯誤則被劃掉。

advanced.eg: Correct answers are given a check mark.
advanced.eg_zh: 正確的答案被打勾。

advanced.eg: Each question is worth five points.
advanced.eg_zh: 每道題目的配分是五分。

1.title: Lunchtime at School
1.passage: A truck has just delivered food to the school. Students from each class pick up their food. Then they bring it back to their classrooms where their classmates are waiting to eat.
1.translation: 一輛卡車剛把飯菜配送到學校。每班的學生抬起他們的飯菜，然後把它搬回教室，他們的同學正在教室等著要吃飯。

advanced.eg: The students are very hungry and can’t wait to dig in.
advanced.eg_zh: 學生們很餓，他們等不及要吃了。

advanced.eg: The lunch containers are set up on tables at the front of the classroom.
advanced.eg_zh: 裝午餐的餐桶被擺放在教室前面的桌子上。

advanced.eg: There are utensils and a stainless steel bowl in the lunch bag.
advanced.eg_zh: 午餐袋裡有餐具和一個不鏽鋼碗。

advanced.eg: Hungry students can eat the leftovers.
advanced.eg_zh: 肚子餓的學生可以吃多餘的飯菜。

advanced.eg: Everybody gets the same amount of food.
advanced.eg_zh: 每個人得到相同的食物量。

1.title: Naptime at School
1.passage: The students have just finished lunch. Now they are taking a nap. It is very quiet because no one is allowed to talk during naptime.
1.translation: 這些學生剛吃完午餐。現在他們正在午睡。教室裡很安靜，因為午休時間不允許任何人講話。

advanced.eg: Don’t fall asleep in class.
advanced.eg_zh: 上課時別睡著了。

advanced.eg: Betty is hunched over with her head resting on her arms.
advanced.eg_zh: 貝蒂趴著，她的頭靠在她的手臂上面。

advanced.eg: After taking a short nap, Jason felt refreshed.
advanced.eg_zh: 在短暫的午睡後，傑森覺得精神恢復了。

advanced.eg: Sleeping hunched over with a full stomach makes me feel a little sick.
advanced.eg_zh: 肚子飽的時候趴著睡覺讓我覺得有點不舒服。

advanced.eg: It is a very uncomfortable position.
advanced.eg_zh: 那是很不舒服的姿勢。

1.title: The School Library
1.passage: Fred found a book he wants to read at the library. He hands the book to the librarian. The librarian is happy to help him check it out.
1.translation: 弗烈德在圖書館找到了他想讀的一本書。他把書交給圖書館員。圖書館員很高興的幫他辦理借書。

advanced.eg: The librarian scans the book and his library card.
advanced.eg_zh: 圖書館員掃描這本書和他的借書證。

advanced.eg: Wendy is browsing the shelves for a book.
advanced.eg_zh: 溫蒂正在瀏覽書櫃找一本書。

advanced.eg: Do you know the book’s title?
advanced.eg_zh: 你知道這本書的書名嗎？

advanced.eg: There are so many books to choose from.
advanced.eg_zh: 有很多書可供選擇。

advanced.eg: The book is due this week.
advanced.eg_zh: 這本書這個星期到期。

1.title: The Water Fountain
1.passage: It is very hot in the school and Ron is thirsty. He goes to the fountain to have a drink. He bends over and takes a sip of water from the fountain.
1.translation: 校園很熱，榮恩感到口渴。他到飲水機喝水。他彎腰在飲水機喝了一小口水。

advanced.eg: Do you drink from public water fountains?
advanced.eg_zh: 你會喝公共飲水機的水嗎？

advanced.eg: Don’t leave the water running.
advanced.eg_zh: 不要讓水一直流。

advanced.eg: The cool water quickly quenches his thirst.
advanced.eg_zh: 涼爽的水很快地解除了他的口渴。

advanced.eg: Mike turns the knob on the top of the fountain.
advanced.eg_zh: 麥可轉動飲水機上面的轉鈕。

advanced.eg: Walk down the hall and there is a drinking fountain on the right.
advanced.eg_zh: 沿著走廊走，右手邊有一台飲水機。

1.title: Looking up New Words
1.passage: Susan is doing her homework. She doesn’t know what “excited” means. She flips through her dictionary and finds the definition.
1.translation: 蘇珊正在做功課。她不知道「excited」這個字的意思。她翻閱字典， 並且找到這個字的解釋。

advanced.eg: Liz read 10 pages of her textbook.
advanced.eg_zh: 莉姿讀了十頁的課本。

advanced.eg: She tries to make a sentence with the new word.
advanced.eg_zh: 她試著用這個生字造一個句子。

advanced.eg: She writes down the definitions for the new words.
advanced.eg_zh: 她寫下所有生字的解釋。

advanced.eg: How do I use the new word in context?
advanced.eg_zh: 我如何在文章中使用這個生字？

advanced.eg: There are a few new words and phrases that she is not sure of.
advanced.eg_zh: 有一些生字和片語她不確定。

1.title: Making Posters
1.passage: These boys are working in a group. They are making a colorful poster. It is a project for art class. Art is their favorite class.
1.translation: 這群男孩正在合力地工作。他們在做一張五彩繽紛的海報。這是美勞課的一項設計。美勞課是他們最喜歡上的課。

advanced.eg: Tom and Joe are cutting out shapes.
advanced.eg_zh: 湯姆和喬正在剪一些形狀。

advanced.eg: There are many scraps of paper lying on the table.
advanced.eg_zh: 有很多碎紙片放在桌子上。

advanced.eg: Jack glues the different colored shapes onto a big piece of paper.
advanced.eg_zh: 傑克將各種不同顏色的形狀貼到一張大張的紙上面。

advanced.eg: Tim and Henry hold up their poster to see how it looks.
advanced.eg_zh: 提姆和亨利將壁報拿高，以便看看做的如何。

advanced.eg: It looks like they are making a big mess.
advanced.eg_zh: 看起來他們正弄得一團亂。

1.title: Classroom Cleanup
1.passage: It is the end of the month and this classroom is very dirty. The elementary students here are cleaning up their classroom. It will be nice and clean when they are finished.
1.translation: 現在是月底了，教室裡很髒。這些小學生正在打掃他們的教室。當他們工作結束後，教室將會變得宜人又乾淨。

advanced.eg: Two boys are cleaning the blinds with a duster.
advanced.eg_zh: 兩個男孩正用雞毛撢子清理百葉窗。

advanced.eg: Everyone is wearing a dust mask.
advanced.eg_zh: 每個人都戴著防塵口罩。

advanced.eg: Could you sweep the hallway, please?
advanced.eg_zh: 能請你打掃一下走廊嗎？

advanced.eg: He is scrubbing the floor with a scrub brush.
advanced.eg_zh: 他正用一把刷子刷地板。

advanced.eg: Sweep the dirt into the dustpan, please.
advanced.eg_zh: 請將灰塵掃到畚斗裡面。

1.title: Post-it Notes
1.passage: Judy is studying for an exam. She writes down some important information on a post-it note. Then she sticks it to a page in her textbook. Now she will be able to find the information easily.
1.translation: 茱蒂正為了考試而讀書。她將一些重點寫在立貼上，然後她把它貼在課本的某一頁。現在她將可以很容易找到資料。

advanced.eg: Post-its are sticky on the back.
advanced.eg_zh: 立貼的背面是有黏性的。

advanced.eg: I removed the post-its from my textbook.
advanced.eg_zh: 我把課本的立貼撕下。

advanced.eg: Can you attach a sticky note to page 23?
advanced.eg_zh: 你可以在第23頁貼一張立貼嗎？

advanced.eg: Post-it notes also make great bookmarks.
advanced.eg_zh: 立貼當作書籤也很棒。

advanced.eg: Post-its help me remember my homework.
advanced.eg_zh: 立貼可以幫助我記得回家作業。

1.title: Flash Drive
1.passage: Sally has a Word file to save. She saves all her homework on her flash drive. This way she can bring it to school without printing it.
1.translation: 莎莉要儲存一個Word檔案。她把全部的作業存到隨身碟。這樣她就可以把作業帶到學校而不用列印出來。

advanced.eg: A memory stick is like a small portable hard drive.
advanced.eg_zh: 隨身碟就像是一個小型的可攜式硬碟。

advanced.eg: Plug the flash drive into a USB port.
advanced.eg_zh: 請將隨身碟插入一個USB接口。

advanced.eg: I need to scan my drives for viruses.
advanced.eg_zh: 我需要掃描我的磁碟機看看是否有病毒。

advanced.eg: Jason sent me an email last week.
advanced.eg_zh: 傑森上星期寄了一封電子郵件給我。

advanced.eg: Alice inserted a disc into the CD-ROM drive.
advanced.eg_zh: 愛麗絲把一片光碟片放入光碟機中。

2.title: Parent Day
2.passage: Yesterday was Parent Day at our school. Parents were invited to come and look in on our class. They got to see what goes on in the classroom and meet the teachers. They stood quietly in the doorway to watch.
2.translation: 昨天是我們學校的家長參觀日，家長們受邀來看我們上課。他們可以看我們在教室的上課情形並且和老師們會面。他們安靜地站在門口觀看。

advanced.eg: My teacher greeted the parents at the door.
advanced.eg_zh: 我的老師在門口和家長們打招呼。

advanced.eg: Several parents observed our class.
advanced.eg_zh: 有幾位家長看我們上課。

advanced.eg: My teacher was nervous because she was being watched.
advanced.eg_zh: 我的老師很緊張，因為有人正盯著她看。

advanced.eg: All of my classmates were on their best behavior.
advanced.eg_zh: 我所有的同學都表現出最好的一面。

advanced.eg: It is hard to pay attention when someone is watching you.
advanced.eg_zh: 有人盯著你看時是很難專注的。

2.title: Skipping
2.passage: I like skipping rope. Today we got to do it in PE class. Students took turns both skipping and swinging the skipping rope around. Mr. Li even tried to do it, too, but he wasn’t very graceful.
2.translation: 我喜歡跳繩。我們今天上體育課時有跳繩。每位同學輪流跳繩和甩繩子。李老師甚至也試著跳跳看，但是他的動作並不是很優美。

advanced.eg: Wendy tripped over her own feet.
advanced.eg_zh: 溫蒂被自己的腳絆倒。

advanced.eg: Don’t skip too fast, or you might fall down.
advanced.eg_zh: 不要跳得太快，否則你可能會跌倒。

advanced.eg: David can do tricks with a skipping rope.
advanced.eg_zh: 大衛會用跳繩耍特技。

advanced.eg: The rope got tangled around my feet.
advanced.eg_zh: 繩子纏住我的腳。

advanced.zh: 適時；抓住恰當的時間或速度
advanced.eg: You need good timing to skip rope.
advanced.eg_zh: 跳繩需掌握良好的時間點。

2.title: Chinese Calligraphy
2.passage: I have been learning how to do calligraphy. It is very challenging. It also requires a lot of concentration. At first I wasn’t very good at it, but I have been getting better with each class.
2.translation: 我一直在學習寫書法。寫書法是很有挑戰性的，它也需要高度的專注力。剛開始的時候，我對書法並不熟練，但是每上一堂課，我就寫得越好。

advanced.eg: Don’t get any ink on your clothes.
advanced.eg_zh: 不要讓墨汁沾到你的衣服。

advanced.eg: The calligraphy brush has a fine point.
advanced.eg_zh: 這枝毛筆的筆尖很細。

advanced.eg: Calligraphy is a very old art form.
advanced.eg_zh: 書法是一個非常古老的藝術形式。

advanced.eg: Your brushstrokes must be very precise.
advanced.eg_zh: 你的筆法必須非常的準確。

advanced.eg: It takes a lot of practice to be good at calligraphy.
advanced.eg_zh: 要寫好書法需要很多的練習。

2.title: Dodgeball
2.passage: The blue team has just thrown the ball and they didn’t hit anyone. A girl on the other side is going to catch the ball and throw it back at them. They all turn around and run for the back of the court.
2.translation: 藍隊剛丟出球，但是他們沒有打中任何人。另一邊有個女孩準備接起球並且向他們反擊。他們全部轉身往球場的後方跑。

advanced.eg: Dodgeball is my favorite PE activity.
advanced.eg_zh: 躲避球是我最喜歡的體育活動。

advanced.eg: Tom’s ball missed my head.
advanced.eg_zh: 湯姆的球沒有打中我的頭。

advanced.eg: Kate dodged the hard throw.
advanced.eg_zh: 凱特避開了這一記猛擊。

advanced.eg: You can’t go past the center line to retrieve a ball.
advanced.eg_zh: 你不能越過中線去撿球。

advanced.eg: The referee makes sure we follow the rules.
advanced.eg_zh: 裁判確認我們會遵守規則。

2.title: Watch Your Step
2.passage: Daniel is not being careful. He is racing up the steps to his next class. He bumps into the girl holding the handrail and almost knocks her over. Several other students hear him quickly running up the stairs and get out of the way in time.
2.translation: 丹尼爾相當不小心。他衝上樓梯趕著去上他的下一堂課。他碰到了一個握著扶手的女孩，並且差一點將她撞倒。其他幾個學生聽到他快跑上樓梯時都及時讓開。

advanced.eg: You have to climb 3 flights of stairs to get to the 3rd floor.
advanced.eg_zh: 你必須爬3段樓梯才能到達3樓。

advanced.eg: Watch your step when you use the stairs.
advanced.eg_zh: 當你爬樓梯時，走路要小心。

advanced.eg: Wendy is upstairs in her bedroom.
advanced.eg_zh: 溫蒂在她樓上的臥室。

advanced.eg: Go downstairs and get me something to drink.
advanced.eg_zh: 你到樓下去拿點東西給我喝。

2.title: Tire Pump
2.passage: When I was about to leave for school this morning, I noticed that my bike had a flat tire. I searched the house and finally found a tire pump. I attached the line to the valve stem and filled the tire with air.
2.translation: 當我今天早上即將上學時，我發現腳踏車的輪胎沒氣了。我在家裡找了一下，最後找到一個打氣筒。我把打氣筒的管子連接到輪胎的打氣孔上，並且幫輪胎充氣。

advanced.eg: Stand on the base of the tire pump to keep it steady.
advanced.eg_zh: 踩住打氣筒的底座使它保持平穩。

advanced.eg: Pump up and down on the handle.
advanced.eg_zh: 用把手上下打氣。

advanced.eg: Use a tire gauge to test the air pressure.
advanced.eg_zh: 使用胎壓計測試胎壓。

advanced.eg: The valve stem is between the spokes on the rim.
advanced.eg_zh: 打氣孔在輪圏上的輪輻之間。

advanced.eg: The tire tube needs to be patched.
advanced.eg_zh: 這個內胎需要修補。

2.title: Julie’s CD Collection
2.passage: Little Julie loves to listen to music. She has a CD case with all her CD’s in it. It is very organized and helps to prevent her collection from getting scratched. She can easily flip through the pages and find a CD she likes.
2.translation: 小茱莉喜歡聽音樂。她有一個CD盒，裡面放著她全部的CD。CD放得很整齊，有助於預防她的收藏品被刮傷。她可以很輕易地翻頁，然後找到她喜歡的CD。

advanced.eg: Put the CD back in the sleeve when you are finished.
advanced.eg_zh: 當你使用完畢時，要將CD放回套子裡。

advanced.eg: Scratched CD’s and DVD’s might skip.
advanced.eg_zh: 刮傷的CD和DVD可能會跳針。

advanced.eg: Can you play track 8 for me?
advanced.eg_zh: 你可以幫我播放第八首嗎?

advanced.eg: You can add more pages to your CD case just like a binder.
advanced.eg_zh: 就像活頁夾一樣，你可以增加更多頁面到CD盒裡。

advanced.eg: Don’t leave your CD’s lying around.
advanced.eg_zh: 你的CD不要到處亂放。

2.title: Correct Your Mistakes
2.passage: Students are always making mistakes when they write. Sometimes they misspell words or write sloppily. They could just cross the mistakes out, but it is better to do it again. This way their notebooks will be neater.
2.translation: 學生寫字時總會出錯。有時候他們會拼錯字，或是寫得很潦草。他們可以把錯誤劃掉就好，但是最好是重新寫一次。這樣的話，他們的筆記本會比較整潔一點。

advanced.eg: Cindy covers the misspelled word with correction tape.
advanced.eg_zh: 辛蒂用修正帶蓋過拼錯的字。

advanced.eg: Don’t use too much whiteout, or it won’t dry quickly.
advanced.eg_zh: 不要用太多的立可白，否則沒辦法很快就乾。

advanced.eg: Tom’s notes are very messy.
advanced.eg_zh: 湯姆的筆記非常凌亂。

advanced.eg: Sally’s book looks very tidy because she writes well.
advanced.eg_zh: 莎莉在書上做的筆記看起來很整齊，因為她寫字很工整。

advanced.eg: Dean always smears ink across his page because he writes with his left hand.
advanced.eg_zh: 迪安用左手寫字，所以總會擦到油墨把頁面弄髒。

2.title: Haircut
2.passage: Timmy gazes at the mirror as the hairdresser clips around his ears. Little pieces of hair slide down the yellow smock. Some gets in his nose and makes it very itchy. He tries his best to ignore the itch and doesn’t move.
2.translation: 當理髮師修剪到提米的耳朵附近時，他盯著鏡子看。一小截一小截的頭髮滑落在黃色的罩衫上。有一些跑進他的鼻子，使得他的鼻子感到非常的癢。他盡可能不去理會它，並且不亂動。

advanced.eg: The clippers make a buzzing sound.
advanced.eg_zh: 理髮剪發出嘶嘶的聲音。

advanced.eg: I blow-dry my hair after washing it.
advanced.eg_zh: 我洗完頭髮後，用吹風機把頭髮吹乾。

advanced.eg: She carefully trims my bangs with the sharp scissors.
advanced.eg_zh: 她用銳利的剪刀，小心翼翼地幫我修剪瀏海。

advanced.eg: If you don’t sit still, I might cut your ear.
advanced.eg_zh: 如果你不靜靜地坐著，我可能會剪到你的耳朵。

advanced.eg: My new hairstyle is really cool.
advanced.eg_zh: 我的新髮型真的很酷。

2.title: Relay Race
2.passage: Kris quickly approaches Tom with the baton in her hand. She yells for him to start running. As he does, he feels the baton slap down on his hand. He runs faster and faster until he is across the finish line.
2.translation: 克莉絲手上握著接力棒快速地接近湯姆，她大聲叫喊，要他開始跑。當他起跑時，他感覺到接力棒啪地一聲打在他手上。他越跑越快，直到他衝過了終點線。

advanced.eg: You need to hand-off the baton to the next runner.
advanced.eg_zh: 你需要把接力棒傳給下一位跑者。

advanced.eg: Don’t run outside of your lane.
advanced.eg_zh: 不要跑出你的跑道。

advanced.eg: There are 4 people on a relay team.
advanced.eg_zh: 一個接力隊有四位成員。

advanced.eg: Our team won the race at the track meet.
advanced.eg_zh: 我們的隊伍在運動會時贏了這場比賽。slow…

advanced.eg: Dropping the baton will slow you down.
advanced.eg_zh: 掉棒會讓你們的速度慢下來。

2.title: Watching TV
2.passage: Jason and Mary have been channel surfing all day. Jason and Mary don’t like the same shows and they are always fighting over what to watch. Jason likes to watch cartoons, but Mary likes science programs.
2.translation: 傑森和瑪莉整天不停地轉台。傑森和瑪莉喜歡的節目不同，他們總是為了該看什麼節目而爭吵。傑森喜歡看卡通，但是瑪莉喜歡科學節目。

advanced.eg: Stop fighting over the remote control.
advanced.eg_zh: 別再為了遙控器而爭吵。

advanced.eg: I like educational shows.
advanced.eg_zh: 我喜歡教育類的節目。

advanced.eg: The movie will start after this commercial.
advanced.eg_zh: 這部電影即將在這個廣告後開始。

advanced.eg: Don’t sit too close to the screen.
advanced.eg_zh: 不要坐得離螢幕太近。

advanced.eg: Can you turn up the volume, please?
advanced.eg_zh: 可以請你把音量調大聲點嗎?

2.title: Folding Clothes
2.passage: The laundry basket is full of clothes. They need to be folded and put away. Amanda neatly folds the T-shirts on her bed. Then she stacks them up. Now she can put them in the dresser.
2.translation: 洗衣籃裡裝滿了衣服。它們需要摺疊並且收好。艾曼達在她的床上把T恤摺得整整齊齊，接著她把衣服堆疊起來。現在她可以把它們放進衣櫥了。

advanced.eg: Your pants will get wrinkles in them if you don’t fold them.
advanced.eg_zh: 如果你不把褲子摺好，它們會變皺。

advanced.eg: Fold the sweaters or hang them in the closet.
advanced.eg_zh: 把這些毛衣摺好或者將它們吊在衣櫥裡。

advanced.eg: Put your dirty laundry in the hamper.
advanced.eg_zh: 把你的髒衣服放在洗衣籃裡。

advanced.eg: You might want to iron your dress shirt before you fold it.
advanced.eg_zh: 在你把襯衫摺起來之前，你可能會先想把它燙平。

advanced.eg: Can you fold the pile of towels?
advanced.eg_zh: 你可以把這一堆毛巾摺起來嗎?

2.title: Tug of War
2.passage: The boys pull as hard as they can to try and get the other team off balance. The tug of war is over when the ribbon in the middle crosses the white line or when one team loses grip and falls down.
2.translation: 這些男孩們拼命的拉，試著讓另一隊失去平衡。當中間的緞帶超過了白線，或者有一隊繩子沒握緊而跌倒時，拔河比賽就結束了。

advanced.eg: Their total strength was too much for the other team.
advanced.eg_zh: 他們全隊的力量是另一隊比不上的。

advanced.eg: Lean back and pull.
advanced.eg_zh: 身體往後傾斜用力拉。

advanced.zh: 與繩子磨擦後產生的灼痛感
advanced.eg: I have rope burn on my hands.
advanced.eg_zh: 我的雙手被繩子磨傷了。

advanced.eg: The coach yelled at them to pull harder.
advanced.eg_zh: 這位教練吆喝他們要更用力拉。

advanced.eg: The crowd cheers as the boys pull back and forth.
advanced.eg_zh: 當男孩們呈現拉鋸戰時，群眾在一旁加油。

2.title: Payphone
2.passage: Tom is supposed to call his mother to come and pick him up. He finds a payphone near the library. He picks up the receiver and holds it up to his ear. Then he puts five dollars into the slot and dials his mother.
2.translation: 湯姆該打電話請他媽媽來接他了。他在圖書館附近找到了公用電話。他拿起話筒，然後拿到他的耳朵旁。接著他把五塊錢投進投幣口，並且撥打電話給他的媽媽。

advanced.eg: Hang up the receiver to get your money back.
advanced.eg_zh: 掛斷電話把你錢取回。

advanced.eg: The telephone cord is twisted.
advanced.eg_zh: 電話線打結了。

advanced.eg: I must have called the wrong number.
advanced.eg_zh: 我一定是打錯電話了。

advanced.eg: Wait for the dial tone before calling the number.
advanced.eg_zh: 撥號前，要先等撥號音出現。

advanced.eg: I called Brian, but I got a busy signal.
advanced.eg_zh: 我打電話給布萊恩，但是我聽到忙線的訊號。

2.title: Music Class
2.passage: The first grade music class has been practicing for weeks. They are going to perform a song for their parents. Every day they have to practice their instruments together. It takes a lot of work to play in perfect time.
2.translation: 這群一年級的學生在音樂課已經練習好幾個星期了。他們即將為他們的父母演奏一首歌曲。他們每天必須一起練習樂器。為了讓演奏整齊一致，必須下很大的功夫。

advanced.eg: The tambourine jingles when you shake it.
advanced.eg_zh: 當你搖動鈴鼓時，它會發出叮噹聲。

advanced.eg: I don’t know where to put my fingers on the recorder.
advanced.eg_zh: 我不知道該把手指放在直笛的哪個位置。

advanced.eg: Hit the bar on the xylophone lightly.
advanced.eg_zh: 輕輕地敲打木琴上的琴鍵。

advanced.eg: Drum roll, please!
advanced.eg_zh: 請擂鼓!

advanced.eg: Tara is playing off-key.
advanced.eg_zh: 塔拉的演奏走音了。

3.title: Get Your Shoes On, Keith!
3.passage: Keith is getting ready to leave for school and has to finish getting dressed. He sits on a small stool to put on his socks. He lifts his leg and pulls the blue sock over his bare foot. Then he slips his shoes on. Now he is ready to go.
3.translation: 基斯正準備上學去，他必須把衣服穿好。他坐在小板凳上穿他的襪子。他舉起腳，把藍色的襪子套進還沒穿好的那隻腳並往上拉，然後他很快地穿上他的鞋子。現在他已經準備好要出發了。

advanced.eg: Don’t forget to tie your shoes.
advanced.eg_zh: 不要忘了繫你的鞋帶。

advanced.eg: Keith’s school uniform is blue and yellow.
advanced.eg_zh: 基斯的學校制服是藍、黃相間的。

advanced.eg: We have to wear a track suit for gym.
advanced.eg_zh: 上體育課時，我們必須要穿運動服。

advanced.eg: Our sports uniforms have a tiger logo on the front.
advanced.eg_zh: 我們的運動服前面有一隻老虎的標識。

advanced.eg: Your shoelaces are untied.
advanced.eg_zh: 你的鞋帶沒綁好。

3.title: Flag-raising Ceremony
3.passage: The flag-raising ceremony is held during assembly. First the national anthem is played. Then another song is played while the national flag rises up the mast. No one is allowed to talk and everyone must stand still to show respect for our country.
3.translation: 升旗典禮在朝會時舉行。首先是播放國歌，接著在播放另一首歌的同時，國旗沿著旗杆升起。升旗時不准講話，而且每個人都必須站著不動，以表示對我們國家的尊敬。--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

advanced.eg: Talking during the ceremony is rude.
advanced.eg_zh: 在典禮中交談是很沒有禮貌的。

advanced.eg: The flag flew at half-mast after the big earthquake.
advanced.eg_zh: 在這場大地震後，國旗降半旗。

advanced.eg: I feel proud when I hear the national anthem.
advanced.eg_zh: 當我聽到國歌時，我感到很驕傲。

advanced.eg: The students stand at attention when the flag goes up.
advanced.eg_zh: 當國旗上升時，學生們立正站好。

advanced.eg: The flag pole is 10 meters long.
advanced.eg_zh: 這枝旗桿有10公尺長。

3.title: Awards Presentation
3.passage: Several lucky children have been called on to the stage. They are going to get awards. The principal gives a short speech to thank them for working so hard. Everyone applauds as the students get their reward.
3.translation: 有幾個幸運的小朋友被叫到台上，他們正準備領獎。校長講了一小段話，來感謝他們如此用功。當他們拿到獎狀時，每個人都給予掌聲。

advanced.eg: Getting an award is quite an achievement.
advanced.eg_zh: 能得到獎狀是一個很大的成就。

advanced.eg: Awards motivate students to work harder.
advanced.eg_zh: 獎狀可以激勵學生更用功。

advanced.eg: The principal handed out all the award certificates.
advanced.eg_zh: 校長頒發所有的獎狀。

advanced.eg: Billy got honors in his math class.
advanced.eg_zh: 比利在數學課得到優異的成績。

advanced.eg: Some students get their awards framed.
advanced.eg_zh: 有些學生把他們的獎狀裱框。

3.title: Clipping Fingernails
3.passage: Mandy likes to look pretty all the time. She never goes anywhere without her hair done. She won’t even take out the garbage without putting a nice outfit on. Today she had to do her nails just to answer the door. It is ridiculous.
3.translation: 曼蒂總是喜歡看起來漂漂亮亮的。不管是去什麼地方，她一定去做頭髮。她甚至拿垃圾出去倒的時候也要穿一套好看的衣服。今天，她光是為了應門就必須修剪指甲，這真是可笑！

advanced.eg: There are all sorts of cosmetics in a department store.
advanced.eg_zh: 百貨公司有各式各樣的化妝品。

advanced.eg: Tom bought a new suit for the graduation ceremony.
advanced.eg_zh: 湯姆為了畢業典禮買了一套新的西裝。

advanced.eg: I have a gold necklace.
advanced.eg_zh: 我有一條金項鍊。

advanced.eg: She trimmed her fingernails with nail clippers.
advanced.eg_zh: 她用指甲剪修剪她的指甲。

advanced.eg: Martha was wearing a heavy coat.
advanced.eg_zh: 瑪莎穿著一件厚重的大衣。

3.title: Fire Extinguishers
3.passage: The fire department came to our school today. They wanted to teach us about what to do in case of a fire. We were shown how to use fire extinguishers properly. They even started small fires for us to put out.
3.translation: 今天消防隊到我們的學校來。他們要教我們發生火災時該怎麼辦，並且為我們示範如何正確使用滅火器。他們甚至還點燃一些小火讓我們撲滅。

advanced.eg: Firemen sprayed water on the flames.
advanced.eg_zh: 消防隊員對著火焰噴水。

advanced.eg: The factory was in flames.
advanced.eg_zh: 工廠失火了。

advanced.eg: There are plenty of fire hoses in that building.
advanced.eg_zh: 那棟建築物中有很多消防水帶。

advanced.eg: The smoke made it difficult to breathe.
advanced.eg_zh: 煙霧造成呼吸困難

advanced.eg: The doorkeeper gave the alarm as soon as he saw the smoke.
advanced.eg_zh: 看守門房的人一看見冒煙就發出警報。

3.title: Mopping Up
3.passage: Cindy is responsible for cleaning the staff room at school. She first sweeps around the furniture. Then she gets out the mop and pail to mop the floor. After that, she checks to see if anything needs to be dusted.
3.translation: 辛蒂在學校負責打掃教職員辦公室。首先她把傢俱周圍打掃乾淨，然後拿出拖把和水桶拖地。接著她便檢查看看是否有任何東西需要除塵。

advanced.eg: His mom scolded him for getting his clothes dirty.
advanced.eg_zh: 他因為把衣服弄髒被媽媽責罵。

advanced.eg: His room was messy.
advanced.eg_zh: 他的房間很凌亂。

advanced.eg: She dusted off the class pictures on the wall.
advanced.eg_zh: 她為牆上的班級合照除塵。

advanced.eg: She scrubbed off the marks on the floor.
advanced.eg_zh: 她把地板上的污點刷掉。

advanced.eg: She cleans the top of the counter with a wet sponge.
advanced.eg_zh: 她用一塊濕海綿把櫃檯上面清理乾淨。

3.title: Heating Packet
3.passage: It is a cold winter day. Craig takes a pocket warmer out of the package and shakes it. It slowly starts to heat up. He holds it between his hands and soon they are nice and toasty warm.
3.translation: 這是一個寒冬的日子。克雷格從包裝盒裡面拿出了一個暖暖包，並且搖動它，暖暖包就開始慢慢地變熱了。他將它握在雙手間，很快地他的雙手變得非常暖和舒服。

advanced.eg: Jen wore a scarf so that she wouldn’t get a sore throat.
advanced.eg_zh: 珍圍了一條圍巾，如此一來她將不會喉嚨疼痛。

advanced.eg: If you don’t dress warm enough, you might catch a cold.
advanced.eg_zh: 如果你穿得不夠暖和，你可能會感冒。

advanced.eg: A toque or warm hat can keep your ears warm.
advanced.eg_zh: 一頂毛線帽或是溫暖的帽子能讓你的耳朵保暖。

advanced.eg: The wind is chilly today.
advanced.eg_zh: 今天的風冷颼颼的。

3.title: Make Your Bed
3.passage: Alex folds his comforter and puts it on the dresser. Then he takes off the sheets and pillowcases and puts them in the dirty laundry basket. Finally he replaces them with a clean set and puts the comforter back on his bed.
3.translation: 亞力克斯把他的被子摺好並且放在衣櫥上。接著他把床單及枕頭套拆下來，並放入洗衣籃子裡。最後，他換上一套乾淨的床單及枕頭套，再把被子放回他的床上。

advanced.eg: I need a warmer blanket.
advanced.eg_zh: 我需要一件比較暖和的毯子。

advanced.eg: The sheet goes over the mattress.
advanced.eg_zh: 床單鋪在床墊上。

advanced.eg: Make your bed after you eat breakfast.
advanced.eg_zh: 吃完早餐後，將你的床鋪好。

advanced.eg: Tuck the sheet under the mattress.
advanced.eg_zh: 把床單塞到床墊下。

advanced.eg: This bedding smells nice and fresh.
advanced.eg_zh: 這套寢具聞起來感覺挺清新的。

3.title: Pencil Sharpeners
3.passage: Rita’s pencil is very dull. She sticks it in the pencil sharpener and places one hand on the top to hold it still. It makes a strange grinding sound as she turns the handle. When she is finished, her pencil is nice and sharp again.
3.translation: 芮塔鉛筆的筆尖很鈍。她把鉛筆放到削鉛筆機裡，並且把一隻手放在上面固定它。當她轉動把手時，削鉛筆機發出了奇怪、刺耳的聲音。當她削完之後，鉛筆又變得很尖了。

advanced.eg: Teacher, I need to sharpen my pencil.
advanced.eg_zh: 老師，我需要削鉛筆。

advanced.eg: The lead broke off the end of my pencil.
advanced.eg_zh: 筆心從我鉛筆的末端斷掉。

advanced.eg: Lots of students use mechanical pencils.
advanced.eg_zh: 有很多學生使用自動鉛筆。

advanced.eg: Chuck, stop chewing on the end of your pencil!
advanced.eg_zh: 查克，不要咬鉛筆的末端。

advanced.eg: Put the pencil shavings in the garbage.
advanced.eg_zh: 把鉛筆屑丟到垃圾桶裡。

3.title: Mowing the Lawn
3.passage: Cutting the grass is a never-ending job. The grass just never seems to stop growing. Every week I take out the mower, cut the grass and rake up the clippings. Next I bag the clippings. Then, before you know it, it is time to cut it again. Being a janitor is a lot of work.
3.translation: 割草是一件永無止息的工作。草似乎永遠不會停止生長。每週我都得拿出割草機來割草，並且把割下來的草耙成一堆，再裝入袋子。然後在你還未查覺之前，又得再次割草了。當工友要做的事還真多啊！

advanced.eg: The blade on the lawn mower is very dangerous.
advanced.eg_zh: 割草機上的刀片是非常危險的。

advanced.eg: The mower leaves long rows of grass clippings.
advanced.eg_zh: 割草機推過的地方留下數長排割過的草。

advanced.eg: We can compost the grass clippings.
advanced.eg_zh: 我們可以將割下的草做成堆肥。

advanced.eg: Put the throttle on high if the grass is thick.
advanced.eg_zh: 如果雜草很茂密，就把油門開大一點。

advanced.eg: Make sure you stop the motor when you clean underneath.
advanced.eg_zh: 當你要清除[割草機]的底部時，確認你是否已把馬達關掉。

3.title: Papaya Milk
3.passage: Dwight and Lenny are making papaya milk. Lenny has already cut and sliced the papaya into small pieces. As he slides the pieces off the plate and into the blender, Dwight pours milk over the top. They also add some ice to make it colder.
3.translation: 德懷特和藍尼正在做木瓜牛奶。藍尼已經將木瓜切成一小塊一小塊。當他讓一塊塊的木瓜從盤子裡滑到果汁機時，德懷特從上方倒入牛奶。他們還加一些冰塊讓它更為冰涼。

advanced.eg: The blender has five different speeds.
advanced.eg_zh: 這台果汁機有五種不同的速度。

advanced.eg: The blades in the blender turn the papaya into pulp.
advanced.eg_zh: 果汁機裡的刀片使木瓜變成果泥。

advanced.eg: The milk gives the drink a creamy taste.
advanced.eg_zh: 牛奶讓這杯飲料有乳脂的口感。

advanced.eg: The blender chops the ice into tiny pieces.
advanced.eg_zh: 果汁機將冰塊切成小小的碎塊。

advanced.eg: The pitcher comes apart so that you can clean it.
advanced.eg_zh: 這個水壺可以讓你拆開清洗。

3.title: Keeping in Touch
3.passage: Linda mails her Aunt Helen once a month. She writes her Aunt a letter and tells her all about what has happened. Sometimes she includes pictures, too. She could just email Aunt Helen, but letters are more personal.
3.translation: 琳達每個月寄信給海倫阿姨。她寫信給她的阿姨，告訴她所有發生過的事。有時候她也會附上一些照片。她可以傳電子郵件給海倫阿姨就好，但是信件更有親切感。

advanced.eg: Don’t forget to write the address on the envelope.
advanced.eg_zh: 別忘記在信封上寫上住址。

advanced.eg: You have to buy a stamp to put on the letter.
advanced.eg_zh: 你必須買郵票貼在信件上。

advanced.eg: The green mailbox is for regular mail only.
advanced.eg_zh: 綠色郵筒只能投一般信件。

advanced.eg: Express mail is faster, but more expensive.
advanced.eg_zh: 快遞郵件比較快，但是比較貴。

advanced.eg: You can buy stamps at the post office.
advanced.eg_zh: 你可以在郵局買到郵票。

3.title: The Recycling Truck
3.passage: The recycling truck plays music over a loudspeaker so that you can hear it coming from a long distance. This warning gives you time to get your recycling out to the curb. If they didn’t play music, how would you know when the truck was coming down your street?
3.translation: 資源回收車透過擴音器播放音樂，這樣你很遠就可以聽到它的到來。這種預告的方式，讓你有時間將回收的物品拿到路邊。假如他們沒有播放音樂，你怎麼會知道資源回收車何時會到你們的街道呢？

advanced.eg: Can this plastic bottle be recycled?
advanced.eg_zh: 這個塑膠瓶可以回收嗎?

advanced.eg: Put anything that is recyclable in the recycling bin.
advanced.eg_zh: 將任何可以回收的東西放入資源回收桶。

advanced.eg: Cardboard and paper can be recycled together.
advanced.eg_zh: 硬紙板和紙張可以放在一起回收。

advanced.eg: The man in the truck will sort the recycling.
advanced.eg_zh: 資源回收車上面的人會將回收的物品分類。

advanced.eg: Recycling is important for the environment.
advanced.eg_zh: 資源回收對環境是很重要的。

3.title: My Piggy Bank
3.passage: My piggy bank is important to me. It teaches me how to save money. I could spend my leftover change, but by saving it I can watch it grow. After a while, I will have enough money to buy something nice.
3.translation: 我的撲滿對我而言是很重要的。它教我如何存錢。我可以花掉剩餘的零錢，但是存起來的話，我可以看著零錢愈來愈多。經過一段時間後，我將會有足夠的錢買件不錯的東西。

advanced.eg: Put your spare change in the piggy bank.
advanced.eg_zh: 將你的多餘的零錢放進撲滿。

advanced.eg: A piggy bank stops my brother from stealing my money.
advanced.eg_zh: 撲滿可以防止我的哥哥偷我的錢。

advanced.eg: The coins go in the slot on the top.
advanced.eg_zh: 硬幣從上方的投幣口進去。

advanced.eg: Remove the plug on the bottom to take your money out.
advanced.eg_zh: 拿掉底部的塞子，以便將你的錢取出來。

advanced.eg: You might be surprised at how much money you can put in a piggy bank.
advanced.eg_zh: 你也許會對撲滿可以存多少錢而感到驚訝。

3.title: Watering the Flowers
3.passage: One of Scott’s household chores is to water the flowers. He checks them every day to see if the soil is dry. If they need water, he fills his watering can from the outside tap. Then he takes it to the flower bed and sprinkles the water over the plants.
3.translation: 史考特的家事之ㄧ就是澆花。他每天巡視花朵，看看土壤是不是乾掉了。假如它們需要水的話，他就用外面的水龍頭將灑水壺裝滿，然後拿到花圃幫植物澆水。

advanced.eg: Flowers will wilt if they don’t get enough water.
advanced.eg_zh: 假如沒有足夠的水，花朵將會枯萎。

advanced.eg: Too much water might make the roots rot.
advanced.eg_zh: 太多水可能會讓根部腐爛。

advanced.eg: Some plants don’t like to get water on their leaves.
advanced.eg_zh: 有些植物不喜歡有水在葉子上。

advanced.eg: You can occasionally add fertilizer to help the plants grow.
advanced.eg_zh: 你可以偶爾加一些肥料幫助植物成長。

advanced.eg: Look for weeds and pull them out when you are watering.
advanced.eg_zh: 當你在澆水的時候，找出雜草並且把他們拔除。

4.title: Basketball
4.passage: A lot of kids in Taiwan like to play basketball after school. In fact, basketball is Taiwan’s favorite pastime. There are many outdoor basketball courts everywhere. They are usually located near schools or parks.
4.translation: 在台灣有很多小孩喜歡在放學後打籃球。事實上，籃球是台灣人最喜愛的娛樂活動。到處都有很多的戶外籃球場，它們通常位於學校或公園的附近。

advanced.eg: Kent passed the ball to Devin.
advanced.eg_zh: 肯特傳球給戴維。

advanced.eg: Dribbling is when you bounce the ball up and down.
advanced.eg_zh: 運球是指你拍球讓它上下彈跳。

advanced.eg: His shot hit the rim.
advanced.eg_zh: 他的投籃打到籃框。

advanced.eg: Dennis had three fouls in last night’s game.
advanced.eg_zh: 在昨晚的比賽中，丹尼斯犯規三次。

advanced.eg: The ball bounced off the backboard and into the basket.
advanced.eg_zh: 球碰到籃板後反彈進到籃框裡。

4.title: Gardening
4.passage: Students are looking after the school’s garden. They are responsible for watering it, weeding it and picking the vegetables. It is hard work, but they enjoy doing it. Maybe some of them will grow up to be gardeners.
4.translation: 學生正在照料學校的菜園，他們要負責澆水、除草，還有摘菜。這是件很辛苦的工作，但是他們樂在其中。也許他們當中有一些人將來長大後會成為園丁。

advanced.eg: A weed is basically an unwanted plant.
advanced.eg_zh: 雜草基本上是一種無用的植物。

advanced.eg: Make sure you pull out the roots, too, or it might grow back.
advanced.eg_zh: 你務必要連根拔起來，否則它可能會再長出來。

advanced.eg: We grow all kinds of vegetables in our garden.
advanced.eg_zh: 我們在我們的菜園裡種植各種蔬菜。

advanced.eg: Peas and other vines need something to crawl up as they grow.
advanced.eg_zh: 豌豆和其它的藤蔓植物生長時，需要有讓它們蔓延的東西。

advanced.eg: Most of the vegetables are harvested in the fall.
advanced.eg_zh: 大部分的蔬菜都在秋天收成。

4.title: Band-aids
4.passage: Kathy cut herself on a piece of broken glass. It wasn’t a bad cut, but she still didn’t want it to get infected. She cleaned around the cut first and then dried it. After that she covered it with a band-aid.
4.translation: 凱西被一塊碎玻璃割傷。傷口雖然不深，但她還是不想讓傷口受到感染。她先把割傷的周圍清洗乾淨，然後把它擦乾。接著，她用一片OK繃把傷口包起來。

advanced.eg: Brent’s cut was deep and required stitches.
advanced.eg_zh: 布蘭特的傷口很深，必須要縫幾針。

advanced.eg: Put pressure on the cut to stop the bleeding.
advanced.eg_zh: 在割傷的部位加壓止血。

advanced.eg: My sister faints at the sight of blood.
advanced.eg_zh: 我姊姊看到血會暈倒。

advanced.eg: Jeremy fell off his bike and scraped his knee badly.
advanced.eg_zh: 傑瑞米從他的腳踏車上跌落下來，他的膝蓋嚴重擦傷。

advanced.eg: A band-aid will prevent germs from getting on the wound.
advanced.eg_zh: OK繃可預防細菌侵入傷口。

4.title: Balloons
4.passage: Kathy and her sisters are trying to blow up balloons. Her sisters are too small and can’t do it. Their lungs aren’t strong enough, but Kathy has no problem doing it. She puts the end of the balloon in her mouth and blows hard. But if the balloon gets too big, it will pop.
4.translation: 凱西和她的妹妹正試著吹氣球。妹妹年紀太小，所以吹不起來。她們的肺還不夠強，但凱西吹氣球並沒有困難。她將氣球末端的吹氣口放進嘴巴，並且用力的吹氣。但是如果吹得太大，氣球就會爆掉。

advanced.eg: Hang on to your balloon or it will float away.
advanced.eg_zh: 抓好你的氣球，否則它會飄走。

advanced.eg: Kathy ties the balloons for her younger sisters.
advanced.eg_zh: 凱西幫她的妹妹們綁氣球。

advanced.eg: Those balloons are very colorful.
advanced.eg_zh: 那些氣球顏色很鮮豔。

advanced.eg: Balloons come in many shapes, but round ones are the most common.
advanced.eg_zh: 氣球有許多的形狀，但圓形是最常見的。

advanced.eg: We used balloons for decorations at my birthday party.
advanced.eg_zh: 我們用氣球為我的生日派對作裝飾。

4.title: Graduation
4.passage: This is a graduation ceremony. Many families have come here to watch their children graduate. The graduating students are all standing in rows on the stage. The tallest students stand in the back row and the shortest students stand in the front row. The principal hands out diplomas to all of the students.
4.translation: 這是一場畢業典禮。許多家庭來到這裡，觀看他們的孩子畢業。即將畢業的學生們全部一排排的站在舞台上，最高的學生站在後排，最矮的學生站在前排。校長頒發畢業證書給所有的學生。

advanced.eg: Everyone is presented with a diploma.
advanced.eg_zh: 每個人都獲頒一張畢業證書。

advanced.eg: One of the homeroom teachers gave a speech.
advanced.eg_zh: 其中一位級任老師發表一篇演說。

advanced.eg: Some of the younger students decorated the stage.
advanced.eg_zh: 有一些年紀較輕的學生佈置舞台。

advanced.eg: Our parents were very proud of us.
advanced.eg_zh: 我們的父母以我們為榮。

advanced.eg: The crowd applauded as each student received their diploma.
advanced.eg_zh: 當每位學生拿到畢業證書時，觀眾給予掌聲。

4.title: A Ride through Jhutang
4.passage: Last week, a group of cyclists met in Jhutang. They rode their bikes around town and checked out all the beautiful gardens and the spacious fields. From time to time they took a water break in a shady spot under a tree to give their legs a rest.
4.translation: 上星期，一群腳踏車騎士在竹塘會合。他們在竹塘四處騎車，並且觀賞所有美麗的花園和寬闊的田野。有時他們會在樹下蔭涼處休息喝水，讓他們的腳歇息一下。

advanced.eg: I had to pedal quickly to keep up with John.
advanced.eg_zh: 我得騎快一點以趕上約翰。

advanced.eg: The chain on my bike came off.
advanced.eg_zh: 我腳踏車的鏈條脫落了。

advanced.eg: Vivian squeezed on the brakes to slow down.
advanced.eg_zh: 薇薇安急按煞車以減慢速度。

advanced.eg: James swerved to miss the kitten.
advanced.eg_zh: 詹姆士為了閃避小貓而突然轉向。

advanced.eg: The book bag was tied to the bike’s rack.
advanced.eg_zh: 書包被綁在腳踏車的置物架上。

4.title: A Personal Performance
4.passage: Today a stringed quartet came to our school to play a song for us. Three of them played the violin and one of them played the cello. They wore matching black suits with white shirts. We sat quietly as they performed for us.
4.translation: 今天有一支弦樂四重奏來到我們的學校演奏歌曲給我們聽。他們其中三人拉小提琴，而另一人拉大提琴。他們穿著白襯衫搭配黑色西裝。當他們為我們演奏時，我們安靜地坐著聆聽。

advanced.eg: They sat up straight in their chairs to play.
advanced.eg_zh: 他們挺直地坐在椅子上演奏。

advanced.eg: The sheet music sat on the music stand so that they could read it.
advanced.eg_zh: 樂譜置放於譜架上，以便他們能夠看譜。

advanced.eg: The quartet has played many concerts.
advanced.eg_zh: 這支四重奏曾在很多演奏會中演出。

advanced.eg: The performance was amazing.
advanced.eg_zh: 這場表演令人驚豔。

advanced.eg: I want to be a musician when I grow up.
advanced.eg_zh: 當我長大時，我想要成為一位音樂家。。

4.title: Making a Card
4.passage: Maria is making a Mother’s Day card for her mom. First she drew a picture of her family and a big heart on the paper. Now she is coloring it with markers. After she colors it, she will probably write a poem for her mom. She is very thoughtful.
4.translation: 瑪麗亞正在為她媽媽做一張母親節卡片。首先，她在紙上畫了一幅家人的畫像，以及一顆大大的愛心。現在她正用彩色筆著色。在她著色之後，她可能會寫一首詩給她媽媽。她真的很貼心。

advanced.eg: Julianne has a set of markers.
advanced.eg_zh: 茱麗安有一組彩色筆。

advanced.eg: Put the lid on the marker or it will dry out.
advanced.eg_zh: 把彩色筆的蓋子蓋好，否則它會乾掉。

advanced.eg: I made a get-well card for my friend in the hospital.
advanced.eg_zh: 我做了一張慰問卡給我住院的朋友。

advanced.eg: My mom appreciated the card I made for her.
advanced.eg_zh: 我媽媽很感謝我為她做的卡片。

advanced.eg: Maria is a creative girl.
advanced.eg_zh: 瑪麗亞是一位有創造力的女孩。

4.title: Fill It Up
4.passage: My mom works at a gas station in Jhutang. Her job is to fill cars, trucks, buses and scooters with gas or diesel. There are several gas pumps there. All of the pumps have 3 grades of fuel. The most expensive grade is 98 and the cheapest is 92. Most of the larger vehicles use diesel.
4.translation: 我媽媽在竹塘的一座加油站工作。她的工作是幫汽車、卡車、公車以及摩托車加汽油或柴油。那裡有幾個汽油幫浦，所有幫浦都有三種品級的汽油。最貴的品級是98，而最便宜的是92。大多數較大型的車輛是用柴油。

advanced.eg: The gas tank is almost empty.
advanced.eg_zh: 油箱幾乎是空的。

advanced.eg: John ran out of gas and had to walk to the gas station.
advanced.eg_zh: 約翰把汽油用完了，必須走路到加油站。

advanced.eg: You shouldn’t breathe in gas fumes.
advanced.eg_zh: 你不應該吸入汽油的氣味。fill…

advanced.eg: Fill it up, please.
advanced.eg_zh: 請加滿。

advanced.eg: She is careful not to spill gas on the ground.
advanced.eg_zh: 她小心翼翼的，避免將汽油溢出到地面上。

4.title: Crossing Guards
4.passage: The road in front of our school is very busy. After school, crossing guards stop traffic so that we can cross the street safely. They hold long poles with brightly colored flags over the street and blow whistles. This lets the cars know that they have to stop for the children.
4.translation: 我們學校前面的馬路有很多人車往來。放學後，導護生會擋住車子，以便讓我們可以安全地過馬路。他們手中拿著很長與鮮豔的旗杆橫越在街道上，並且吹著哨子。這樣可以讓汽車駕駛們知道要停車讓兒童通過。

advanced.eg: It is not safe to run across the street.
advanced.eg_zh: 穿越街道是不安全的。

advanced.eg: It is dangerous to cross the street when it is busy.
advanced.eg_zh: 在交通繁忙時穿越街道是危險的。

advanced.eg: People are always in a hurry to get home.
advanced.eg_zh: 人們總是急著要回到家。

advanced.eg: The students hurried to the crosswalk.
advanced.eg_zh: 學生們趕緊到行人穿越道。

advanced.eg: The crossing guards have to wear reflective vests.
advanced.eg_zh: 導護生必須穿著反光背心。

4.title: Teatime
4.passage: My father likes to have tea with his friend every afternoon. It is part of his daily routine. They usually sit on the armchairs in the living room because it is comfortable to do this. While they drink their tea, they talk about work and the weather. My father thinks teatime is very relaxing, but I think it is very boring.
4.translation: 我爸爸喜歡每天下午跟他的朋友一起喝茶，這是他每天的例行公事之一。他們通常會坐在客廳的扶手椅上，因為這樣子喝茶很舒服。當他們喝茶的時候，他們會談論工作和天氣。我爸爸認為下午茶的時間能讓人心情放鬆，但我覺得它很無聊。

advanced.eg: Dad’s tea set is used all the time.
advanced.eg_zh: 爸爸的茶具一直都有在使用。

advanced.eg: Can you pour me some more tea?
advanced.eg_zh: 你可以幫我再多倒一些茶嗎?

advanced.eg: The tea was so hot that I burned my tongue.
advanced.eg_zh: 茶太燙了，結果我燙傷了自己的舌頭。

advanced.eg: Set your tea cup on the coaster, please.
advanced.eg_zh: 請將你的茶杯放在杯墊上。

advanced.eg: Pour the hot water into the teapot.
advanced.eg_zh: 將熱水倒進茶壺中。

4.title: Playing with the Fan
4.passage: Tom is a very curious boy. He is always checking things out to see how they work. Sometimes he plays with dangerous things like the fan. The fan is good for cooling off a room, but it isn’t a toy. If he sticks his finger between the wires on the guard, his finger might get cut off.
4.translation: 湯姆是一個很好奇的男孩，他總會查看東西是怎麼運作的。有時他會玩像電風扇那樣危險的物品。電風扇有利於降低室內的溫度，但它不是玩具。假如他將手伸進防護罩的鐵絲間隔中，他的手指頭有可能會被切斷。

advanced.eg: The fan made a nice breeze in the room.
advanced.eg_zh: 電風扇在房間內產生舒服的涼風。

advanced.eg: The fan moves from side to side.
advanced.eg_zh: 電風扇左右地轉動。

advanced.eg: The blades on the fan spin very quickly.
advanced.eg_zh: 電風扇的葉片快速地轉動。

advanced.eg: Keep fans out of the reach of small children.
advanced.eg_zh: 將電風扇放在小孩子碰不到的地方。

advanced.eg: Fans are much cheaper than air-conditioners.
advanced.eg_zh: 電風扇比冷氣便宜多了。

4.title: A Musical Competition
4.passage: I have been learning to play the recorder for two years. I have become very good at it, so my friends and I decided to enter a contest. I didn’t want to at first because I was very nervous, but my mom said that I had nothing to worry about.
4.translation: 我學習吹直笛已經兩年了。我已經成為很棒的直笛手，所以我和我的朋友們決定要參加比賽。起初，我不想要參加，因為我很緊張。但是我媽媽說：沒有什麼好擔心的。

advanced.eg: I got stage fright before the contest.
advanced.eg_zh: 在比賽前，我會怯場。

advanced.eg: This was my first recorder competition.
advanced.eg_zh: 這是我第一次的直笛比賽。

advanced.eg: I only played one note wrong during the song.
advanced.eg_zh: 在這首歌曲中，我只吹錯一個音符。

advanced.eg: The judges liked the song we played.
advanced.eg_zh: 裁判們喜歡我們演奏的歌曲。

advanced.eg: Hopefully we will compete together again.
advanced.eg_zh: 但願我們能再度一起比賽。

4.title: Getting a Checkup
4.passage: Derek is coughing and sneezing all the time. He has a cold. The doctor uses a stethoscope to check out his breathing. She holds the end of the stethoscope to his chest and listens. Now she can hear him breathe in and out to see if his lungs are okay.
4.translation: 德理克不停的咳嗽和打噴嚏，他感冒了。醫生用聽診器檢查他的呼吸。她握著聽診器的末端貼著他的胸部，並且聆聽胸部的心音。現在，她可以藉由聽他的呼氣及吐氣，來查看他的肺部是否正常。

advanced.eg: The doctor had to take my temperature.
advanced.eg_zh: 醫生必須量我的體溫。

advanced.eg: I took a deep breath so that the doctor could hear it.
advanced.eg_zh: 我做了一次深呼吸，以便醫生能夠聽診。

advanced.eg: He has a sore throat and the chills.
advanced.eg_zh: 他喉嚨痛及打冷顫。

advanced.eg: I have a fever, but I feel cold!
advanced.eg_zh: 我在發燒，但我卻覺得很冷!

advanced.eg: Derek will take medicine until he feels better.
advanced.eg_zh: 德瑞克將會一直服藥，直到他覺得好點為止。

4.title: Open Wide
4.passage: I hate going to the dentist for a checkup. He uses strange tools to poke at my teeth and gums. Sometimes it really hurts. My jaw gets sore, too, because I have to open my mouth so wide. The only good thing is that he gives me a prize if I sit still.
4.translation: 我討厭到牙醫那裡檢查牙齒。他用奇怪的器具戳我的牙齒及齒齦。有時候這真的很痛。我的下巴也會很酸，因為我必須把我的嘴巴張得很大。唯一的好處是，如果我坐著不亂動，他會給我獎品。

advanced.eg: I had to get a filling because I had a cavity.
advanced.eg_zh: 我必須補牙，因為我有一顆蛀牙。

advanced.eg: The dentist said I need to floss every day.
advanced.eg_zh: 牙醫說：我需要天天用牙線清理牙齒。

advanced.eg: The dental clinic smells like a medicine cabinet.
advanced.eg_zh: 牙醫診所聞起來的味道像藥櫃一樣。

advanced.eg: The dentist had to pull out one of my front teeth.
advanced.eg_zh: 牙醫必須拔掉我其中的一顆門牙。

advanced.eg: One of my back teeth was rotten.
advanced.eg_zh: 我後面的一顆牙齒蛀掉了。

5.title: Happy Birthday to Little Jimmy
5.passage: Today is a very special day because it is little Jimmy’s first birthday. All of his family has come to celebrate with him. There is a beautifully decorated cake in the middle of the table. Jimmy looks hungrily at the cake as everyone claps and sings “Happy Birthday” to him.
5.translation: 今天是一個非常特別的日子，因為今天是小吉米的一歲生日。所有的家人都與他一同慶祝。在桌子的中間有一個裝飾精美的蛋糕。當每個人都拍手為吉米唱生日快樂歌時，他飢餓似地盯著蛋糕看。

advanced.eg: Jimmy received many presents.
advanced.eg_zh: 吉米收到很多的禮物。

advanced.eg: They eat the cake on paper plates.
advanced.eg_zh: 他們吃紙盤上的蛋糕。

advanced.eg: Jimmy’s brother hides behind grandpa and giggles excitedly.
advanced.eg_zh: 吉米的弟弟躲在爺爺的後面，並且很興奮地咯咯笑。

advanced.eg: The white and yellow icing looks like a big egg on the cake.
advanced.eg_zh: 黃白相間的糖衣看起來就像在蛋糕上面的一個大雞蛋。

advanced.eg: Grandma happily leads the family in singing.
advanced.eg_zh: 奶奶開心地帶領家人唱歌。

5.title: Wipeout
5.passage: Marty always rides his bike carelessly. He daydreams and sings while he rides. One day he is going to have a serious accident. This time he luckily crashed into a wall. Next time it might be a car or truck. He needs to learn the rules of the road.
5.translation: 馬帝騎腳踏車總是漫不經心。當他騎車時，他邊胡思亂想邊唱歌。總有一天他會發生嚴重的車禍。這次他很幸運的只是撞到牆壁。下一次，他也許就會撞到車子或是卡車。他需要學習道路交通規則。

advanced.eg: Ben badly scraped his knee on the road.
advanced.eg_zh: 班在路上嚴重地擦傷了膝蓋。

advanced.eg: The basket on his bike is terribly bent.
advanced.eg_zh: 他腳踏車上的籃子嚴重地彎曲。

advanced.eg: Carl lies on the ground in pain.
advanced.eg_zh: 卡爾痛苦地躺在地上。

advanced.eg: This is not his first wipeout.
advanced.eg_zh: 這並不是他第一次跌倒。

advanced.eg: When he finally gets up, he carefully hobbles home.
advanced.eg_zh: 當他最後爬起來時，他非常小心地跛行回家。

5.title: The Bakery
5.passage: Travis loves the smell of the bakery. It makes him instantly hungry. He quickly grabs a tray and a pair of tongs. He slowly walks down the aisle and stares hungrily at all the baking. There are so many choices that he can’t make up his mind.
5.translation: 崔必斯喜歡麵包店的味道，這種味道會讓他立刻變餓。他很快地拿了一個托盤和夾子。他沿著通道緩緩地走著，並且垂涎地看著所有的麵包。因為有太多的選擇了，以致於他拿不定主意要買什麼。

advanced.eg: The bread is baked fresh every morning.
advanced.eg_zh: 麵包都是每天早上現烤的。

advanced.eg: The cream puffs make Travis drool hungrily.
advanced.eg_zh: 奶油泡芙讓崔必斯飢餓地垂涎三尺。

advanced.eg: The jelly-filled donuts are his favorite.
advanced.eg_zh: 塗滿果醬的甜甜圈是他的最愛。

advanced.eg: The baker is constantly baking new delicious sweets.
advanced.eg_zh: 麵包師傅不停地烘焙新鮮美味的甜點。

advanced.eg: The prices are marked in front of each item.
advanced.eg_zh: 價格標示在每樣商品的前面。

5.title: Water for Work
5.passage: Penelope is filling her thermos with water before she goes to work. She pushes down on the blue handle. The water pours out of the bottle into her thermos. Then she puts the lid back on the thermos. Now she will have water all day long at work.
5.translation: 潘娜洛普在上班前將她的保溫瓶裝滿水。她按下出水鈕上藍色的壓板，水就從桶子注入到她的保溫瓶裡。接著她將蓋子蓋回保溫瓶。現在，在她上班時，整天都有水可以喝了。

advanced.eg: There is a small cup attached to the top of the thermos.
advanced.eg_zh: 保溫瓶上面附了一個小小的杯子。

advanced.eg: The water filter cleans the water.
advanced.eg_zh: 淨水器能使水質乾淨。

advanced.eg: There is cold water in the water cooler.
advanced.eg_zh: 飲水冷卻器裡有冰水。

advanced.eg: The large bottle of water has a tap attached to it.
advanced.eg_zh: 這大瓶水上面裝了一個出水龍頭。

advanced.eg: She cleans her thermos regularly.
advanced.eg_zh: 她定期地清洗她的保溫瓶。

5.title: The Photocopier
5.passage: Luke needs to prepare for his English class. He carefully places a worksheet in the photocopier and closes the lid. Then he punches in the number of copies he wants. Once that is done, he pushes the start button.
5.translation: 路克需要為他的英語課做準備。他小心地將一張練習題放在影印機上，接著蓋上蓋板。然後，他輸入了他想要影印的數量。這些都完成後，他按了啟動的按鈕。

advanced.eg: A photocopier can quickly print things.
advanced.eg_zh: 影印機可以快速地影印。

advanced.eg: Do you know how to clear a paper jam in the copier?
advanced.eg_zh: 你知道如何清除影印機卡紙嗎？

advanced.eg: . Pull out the top tray and put more paper in.
advanced.eg_zh: 把最上面的紙匣拉出來，然後放更多的紙張進去。

advanced.eg: The copier can even staple papers together.
advanced.eg_zh: 這台影印機甚至可以把紙張裝訂起來。

advanced.eg: Put the original document face down.
advanced.eg_zh: 將原稿的正面朝下放好。

5.title: Airing out the Blankets
5.passage: Laura’s family doesn’t have a clothesline. Instead, they use chairs to air out their blankets in the driveway. They lay the blankets across the chairs so that they don’t touch the dirty ground. I hope they don’t hang their underwear outside, too!
5.translation: 蘿拉的家沒有曬衣繩，他們用椅子代替，將被子放在車道上通風。他們將被子鋪在椅子上，如此一來，被子才不會碰到骯髒的地面。我希望他們不會也將內衣褲吊掛在外面。

advanced.eg: Sunshine kills germs that live on blankets.
advanced.eg_zh: 陽光會殺死住在被子裡的細菌。

advanced.eg: The sun can fade colors and make things look old quickly.
advanced.eg_zh: 陽光會使顏色褪色，而且很快地讓東西看來變得老舊。

advanced.eg: A nice breeze helps to make sheets fresh again.
advanced.eg_zh: 宜人的微風使床單又變得非常清新。

advanced.eg: Don’t hang out your laundry if it is too humid.
advanced.eg_zh: 若天氣太潮溼的話，別把你的衣服掛在外面。

advanced.eg: Take the fresh blankets in before it gets dark.
advanced.eg_zh: 在天黑之前，把潔淨的被子收進來。

5.title: Playing in the Sand
5.passage: Little Tim is spending the day on the seashore. He loves to play in the sand. He digs holes to see what he can find. Sometimes he finds little crabs. Sometimes he finds clams. Maybe someday he will find treasure.
5.translation: 小提姆一整天在海邊玩，他喜歡在沙灘上玩沙。他挖洞看看可以找到什麼東西。有時候他發現小螃蟹，有的時候他發現蛤蜊。也許有一天，他將會找到寶藏。

advanced.eg: Let’s build a sandcastle.
advanced.eg_zh: 我們一起來建造一座沙堡。

advanced.eg: Tim looked around for seashells.
advanced.eg_zh: 提姆四處找尋貝殼。

advanced.eg: You shouldn’t litter when you are at the beach.
advanced.eg_zh: 當你在海邊時，不應該亂丟垃圾。

advanced.eg: He could hear the waves hitting the shore.
advanced.eg_zh: 他可以聽到海浪拍打海岸的聲音。

advanced.eg: Don’t go on the dock without your parents.
advanced.eg_zh: 沒有父母親的陪伴不要去碼頭。

5.title: The Playground
5.passage: Janice goes to the playground every Sunday. She meets other neighborhood girls there and they play together. She really likes the slide. It is fun to climb to the top and slide down. Janice giggles happily as she slides to the bottom.
5.translation: 珍妮絲每個星期日都到遊戲場。在那邊她會遇見住在附近的女孩子，並且和她們一起玩。她真的很喜歡玩溜滑梯。爬到上面再溜下來是很好玩的。當珍妮絲往下溜到底部時，她高興地咯咯笑。

advanced.eg: There is also a see-saw at the playground.
advanced.eg_zh: 在遊樂場裡也有一座翹翹板。

advanced.eg: The girls hang from the bars on the jungle gym.
advanced.eg_zh: 女孩們吊掛在攀爬架的橫槓上面。

advanced.eg: They push each other on the swings.
advanced.eg_zh: 他們互相推鞦韆。

advanced.eg: Janice thinks she is too old to play in the sandbox.
advanced.eg_zh: 珍妮斯認為她年紀太大，不適合在沙坑裡玩了。

advanced.eg: The playground is very busy on Sundays.
advanced.eg_zh: 這座遊戲場在星期日時很熱鬧。

5.title: Climbing Trees
5.passage: Jillian’s favorite place is the park. She comes here whenever she wants to be alone. Then she carefully climbs up the tree in the middle of the park. No one can bother her up in the tree. Sometimes she even sleeps up there on a big limb.
5.translation: 茱莉安最喜歡的地方是公園。每當她想要獨處時，她就會來到這裡，然後小心翼翼的爬上公園中間的樹。當她在樹上時，沒有人可以打擾她。有時候，她甚至睡在大樹幹上面。

advanced.eg: Those branches move in the wind.
advanced.eg_zh: 那些樹枝隨風搖曳。

advanced.eg: This tree has very tiny leaves.
advanced.eg_zh: 這棵樹的樹葉很小。

advanced.eg: She tries to get a grip on the next branch.
advanced.eg_zh: 她試著緊緊的抓住旁邊的樹枝。

advanced.eg: The bark is very thick and rough.
advanced.eg_zh: 這棵樹的樹皮又厚又粗糙。

advanced.eg: My father built a tree house for me.
advanced.eg_zh: 我爸爸為我搭建了一間樹屋。

5.title: Swinging with Mom
5.passage: Ruby is playing on the swing set with her mom. They are having a contest to see who can go the highest. Ruby leans back and pushes out her legs on the way forward. Then she tucks her legs in on the way back. This makes her go faster and higher.
5.translation: 露比和她的媽媽正在玩鞦韆，她們正在比賽看誰能夠盪得最高。在往前盪的時候，露比的身體向後傾斜，並且把雙腳往前伸；然後在往後盪時，她縮回雙腳。這樣可以使她盪得更快更高。

advanced.eg: Ruby holds the chains tightly.
advanced.eg_zh: 露比緊緊地握住鏈條。

advanced.eg: The seat on the swing is soft.
advanced.eg_zh: 鞦韆上的座位是很軟的。

advanced.eg: Drag your feet on the ground to slow down.
advanced.eg_zh: 用你的腳在地上拖行，讓速度減緩下來。

advanced.eg: If you twist the chains around, you can spin quickly.
advanced.eg_zh: 如果你扭轉鏈條，你可以快速地旋轉。

advanced.eg: Ruby could swing back and forth for hours.
advanced.eg_zh: 露比可以前後來回擺盪上幾個小時。

5.title: Pottery Class
5.passage: These young ladies are taking a pottery class. They listen to the teacher’s directions. Then they watch her mold the clay. After that, they can try doing it by themselves. The teacher can show them what to do if anyone has a problem.
5.translation: 這些年輕的女士們正在上陶藝課。她們聽從老師的指導，然後她們看著她捏塑黏土。之後，她們可以試著自己動手做。如果任何人有問題，老師會為她們示範怎麼做。

advanced.eg: Roll the clay between your hands to make a ball.
advanced.eg_zh: 將陶土放在你的雙手之間滾動，讓它成為一個圓球。

advanced.eg: Press down on the clay to flatten it out.
advanced.eg_zh: 將黏土往下壓，使它成為扁平的形狀。

advanced.eg: Use your fingers to shape the clay.
advanced.eg_zh: 用你的手指來塑造陶土的形狀。

advanced.eg: The pottery will be put in a kiln.
advanced.eg_zh: 陶器將被放進窯裡。

advanced.zh: (陶器等的)焙燒；燒製（陶器、磚等）
advanced.eg: Firing dries out the clay and makes it hard.
advanced.eg_zh: 焙燒可以讓黏土變得又乾又硬。

5.title: Eating Watermelon
5.passage: A big watermelon sits on a table covered with newspaper. Kyle sees the watermelon and suddenly becomes hungry. He grabs a slice and begins to eat it. Bits of watermelon fly everywhere. In no time, the whole watermelon is gone. Oh no! He didn’t spit out the seeds.
5.translation: 一顆大西瓜放在舖了報紙的桌子上。凱爾看見西瓜後，突然變得很餓 。他拿了一片西瓜，然後就開始吃。一小塊一小塊的西瓜噴的到處都是。很快地，整顆西瓜就被吃完了。噢，不！他沒有把西瓜籽吐出來！

advanced.eg: The rind tastes a little sour.
advanced.eg_zh: 外皮吃起來有點酸。

advanced.eg: Can I have a piece of watermelon?
advanced.eg_zh: 我可以吃一片西瓜嗎？

advanced.eg: Mom sliced the watermelon into small pieces.
advanced.eg_zh: 媽媽將西瓜切成一片一片的。

advanced.eg: Watermelons can grow to enormous sizes.
advanced.eg_zh: 西瓜可以長到很大顆。

advanced.eg: Kyle devoured several juicy pieces of watermelon.
advanced.eg_zh: 凱爾狼吞虎嚥地吃了好多片多汁的西瓜。

5.title: The Arcade
5.passage: There are lots of different games to play at the arcade, but Eugene likes the racing game the best. It is almost like driving a real car. It has a steering wheel, a gearshift, a gas pedal and a brake. Unlike a real car, this car runs on coins and not on gas.
5.translation: 遊樂場有很多不同的遊戲可以玩，但是尤金最喜歡玩賽車遊戲。玩這個遊戲跟開真正的汽車幾乎一樣，它有方向盤、變速排檔、油門及煞車。和真正的汽車不一樣的是，這台車的運轉是用硬幣而不是汽油。

advanced.eg: Matt beats the other cars and wins the race.
advanced.eg_zh: 麥特勝過了其它的車子，贏得了這場比賽的勝利。

advanced.eg: He gets to continue playing as long as he wins.
advanced.eg_zh: 只要他贏的話，他可以繼續玩。

advanced.eg: Daniel pretends he is really driving.
advanced.eg_zh: 丹尼爾假裝他真的在開車。

advanced.eg: The game is over when he loses.
advanced.eg_zh: 當他輸掉比賽時，遊戲就結束了。

advanced.eg: Each level gets more and more difficult.
advanced.eg_zh: 每一關會變得愈來愈難。

5.title: Tire Race
5.passage: Two students are getting ready to race. But this isn’t a normal race. They have to quickly roll a tire across the finish line. It sounds easy, but it is hard to roll the tire straight. And sometimes the tire rolls faster than you can run.
5.translation: 有兩位學生正在準備比賽，但這不是一般的比賽。他們必須快速地滾動輪胎穿過終點線。聽起來很簡單，但是要讓輪胎筆直地滾動是很困難的。而且有時候，輪胎滾動的速度會比你跑得還要快。

advanced.eg: You need to keep the tire balanced.
advanced.eg_zh: 你需要使輪胎保持平衡。

advanced.eg: The tire might wobble out of control.
advanced.eg_zh: 輪胎可能會搖晃失控。

advanced.eg: David tripped over the tire and fell down.
advanced.eg_zh: 大衛絆到輪胎而跌倒了。

advanced.eg: The teacher begins the countdown, “5, 4, 3, 2, 1…go!”
advanced.eg_zh: 老師開始倒數計時，「五、四、三、二、一，開始!」

advanced.eg: It was a close finish.
advanced.eg_zh: 到達終點的時間非常接近。

5.title: The Produce Section
5.passage: Tina and her friend have come to the supermarket to buy fresh vegetables. There are so many different vegetables in the cooler. Some are already packaged and some you put in a bag yourself. Tina checks out the mushrooms while her friend looks for a cabbage.
5.translation: 提娜和她的朋友到超市買新鮮的蔬菜。在冷藏櫃裡有很多不同的蔬菜。有些已經包裝好了，而有些則是要你自己拿來放在袋子裡。當提娜的朋友在找高麗菜時，她正看著蘑菇。

advanced.eg: Vegetables are kept cool so they don’t spoil.
advanced.eg_zh: 蔬菜冷藏起來才不會腐壞掉。

advanced.eg: The lettuce and celery are wrapped in cellophane.
advanced.eg_zh: 萵苣和芹菜用保鮮膜包起來。

advanced.eg: You can buy carrots that are already peeled.
advanced.eg_zh: 你可以買到已經削皮的胡蘿蔔。

advanced.eg: The cherry tomatoes come in a plastic container.
advanced.eg_zh: 小蕃茄用塑膠容器裝起來。

advanced.eg: I need one head of lettuce.
advanced.eg_zh: 我需要一顆萵苣。

6.title: Cell Phone
6.passage: It is winter vacation and Wade is extremely bored. He takes out his cell phone and quickly dials his friend. There is no answer. He frantically calls another friend, but again there is no answer. Every one of his friends is on vacation and he is stuck at home alone. What will he do?
6.translation: 現在是寒假，韋德非常地無聊。他拿出手機，並且很快地撥給他的朋友。沒有人回應。他發狂似地打電話給另一個朋友，但是還是一樣沒有人回應。他的每個朋友都在度假，只有他一個人坐困家中。他要做什麼呢?

advanced.eg: My phone doesn’t get a signal in the elevator.
advanced.eg_zh: 在電梯裡我的手機收不到訊號。

advanced.eg: Send me a text when you have time.
advanced.eg_zh: 當你有空時傳簡訊給我。

advanced.eg: I left Tom a message.
advanced.eg_zh: 我留了一通留言給湯姆。

advanced.eg: Your cell needs to be recharged.
advanced.eg_zh: 你的手機需要充電。

advanced.eg: Maggie is constantly on the phone.
advanced.eg_zh: 瑪姬老是在講電話。

6.title: Playing Cards
6.passage: Calvin and his friends are going to play a card game. First he shuffles the deck of cards. Then he quickly deals the cards to his friends and sets the deck in front of himself. Calvin picks up his cards and looks at his hand. He has some good cards and thinks that he will win the game.
6.translation: 喀爾文和他的朋友們正準備玩撲克牌。他先洗牌，然後很快地發牌給他的朋友，並接著把紙牌放在他自己的前面。喀爾文拿起他的牌並且看著手中的牌。他有一些好牌，並且認為他將會贏得這場牌局。

advanced.eg: The four suits are clubs, diamonds, hearts and spades.
advanced.eg_zh: 紙牌的四種花色是梅花、方塊、紅心及黑桃。

advanced.eg: Bob tries to cheat when he plays cards.
advanced.eg_zh: 當鮑勃在玩牌時，他試圖想要作弊。

advanced.eg: The ace of spades is the highest card in most games.
advanced.eg_zh: 在大部分的牌局中，黑桃A是最大的牌。

advanced.eg: Johnny has a pair of kings, three jacks and one queen.
advanced.eg_zh: 強尼有一對國王、三張杰克以及一張皇后。

advanced.eg: Paul draws a 4 of clubs and quickly discards it.
advanced.eg_zh: 保羅抽到了一張梅花四，然後很快地把它打出去。

6.title: Lifting Weights
6.passage: Colin and Elmer were very weak. They wanted to be stronger, so they decided to exercise more. Since then they have lifted weights almost every day. At first, Elmer could barely lift a light dumbbell off the ground, but now he can easily lift it over his head. Colin wasn’t very strong either, but his muscles are getting bigger each time he exercises.
6.translation: 柯林和埃爾默以前身體很虛弱。他們想要變得更強壯，所以他們決定要多運動。從那時起，他們幾乎每天都在練舉重。剛開始，埃爾默只能勉強地將啞鈴舉起離地面而已，但是現在他可以輕易地將它舉過頭。柯林以前也不是很強壯，但是，每次的運動使他的肌肉變得愈來愈強壯。

advanced.eg: They warm up with light weights.
advanced.eg_zh: 他們用輕一點的東西(輕量級的物品；東西)來暖身。

advanced.eg: The boys train almost every day to keep up their strength.
advanced.eg_zh: 男孩們幾乎每天接受訓練以保持他們的體力。

advanced.eg: A barbell is longer than a dumbbell.
advanced.eg_zh: 槓鈴比啞鈴還要長。

advanced.eg: Elmer can bench press 30kg.
advanced.eg_zh: 埃爾默可以臥舉三十公斤。

advanced.eg: Colin can only curl 2kg.
advanced.eg_zh: 柯林只能彎舉兩公斤。

6.title: Wet Dog
6.passage: It is bath time for CP. He enjoys his baths and always stands very still. May gives him his bath on the balcony of her apartment. She uses a garden hose that is attached to the outside tap. She rolls up her pant legs so that they don’t get wet.
6.translation: 現在是給CP洗澡的時間。牠很喜歡洗澡，而且總是非常安靜的站著。梅在她公寓的陽台上幫牠洗澡。她用的是一條接在外面水龍頭的澆花水管。她捲起褲管，才不會弄濕。

advanced.eg: There is a special shampoo made just for dogs.
advanced.eg_zh: 有一種特殊的洗髮劑是專為狗兒們所做的。

advanced.eg: CP always shakes to dry off.
advanced.eg_zh: CP總是抖動身體使身體變乾。

advanced.eg: A weekly bath keeps CP’s coat nice and shiny.
advanced.eg_zh: 每週洗澡，讓CP的毛髮既好看又有光澤。

advanced.eg: A bath also removes hair that he is shedding.
advanced.eg_zh: 洗澡也可以去除他正在掉落的毛髮。

advanced.eg: Although he likes baths, he is still a little nervous.
advanced.eg_zh: 雖然他喜歡洗澡，他仍然會有一點緊張。

6.title: Practicing the Guitar
6.passage: Jenny is practicing for an upcoming concert. She reads the notes in her music book as she strums the guitar. Her hands are small, but she is still able to wrap them around the neck of the guitar. Her tiny fingers push on the strings to form a chord. The body of the guitar rests on her lap while she plays.
6.translation: 珍妮正為了即將到來的演奏會練習。當她彈奏著吉他時，她看著音樂本上的音符)。她的手很小，但是她依然能夠握住吉他的琴頸。她纖細的手指頭按壓琴弦而形成一個和弦。當她彈奏時，琴身就倚靠在她的膝蓋上。

advanced.eg: She always tunes the guitar before she plays.
advanced.eg_zh: 她總是在彈奏吉他之前為它調音。

advanced.eg: Acoustic guitars are great for beginners.
advanced.eg_zh: 木吉他對初學者是很好的。

advanced.eg: Running the pick across several strings is called strumming.
advanced.eg_zh: 用撥片橫彈過幾根弦叫作刷奏。

advanced.eg: Plucking one string at a time is called picking.
advanced.eg_zh: 每次彈撥一根就稱之為撥弦。

advanced.eg: A standard guitar can have from 19-24 frets.
advanced.eg_zh: 一把標準的吉他有19-24個音品。

6.title: Homeless Puppy
6.passage: Susan has found a poor hungry puppy near a teashop. It is very thin and quite nervous of people. He probably hasn’t eaten in a long time. Luckily, Susan has some buns in her bag. She generously shares one with the starving little dog. He quickly gulps it down and then runs away.
6.translation: 蘇珊在一間茶飲店附近，發現一隻既可憐又飢餓的小狗，牠非常的瘦弱，而且對人感到相當的緊張不安，牠大概已經有很長的一段時間沒有吃東西了。幸好蘇珊的包包裡有一些小圓麵包，她慷慨地分了一個給這隻挨餓的小狗。牠很快地把它吃掉，然後就跑走了。

advanced.eg: There are a lot of stray dogs living in the streets.
advanced.eg_zh: 有很多的流浪狗在街頭生活。

advanced.eg: Street dogs are often unhealthy and covered with fleas.
advanced.eg_zh: 流浪狗通常不健康，而且身上佈滿跳蚤。

advanced.eg: Some of the dogs are lost and can’t find their way home.
advanced.eg_zh: 有些狗是迷路，找不到回家的路。

advanced.eg: Susan crouches down to feed the nervous puppy.
advanced.eg_zh: 蘇珊蹲下來餵這隻緊張不安的小狗。

advanced.eg: It sniffs at the bun to make sure it is ok to eat.
advanced.eg_zh: 牠聞一聞這小圓麵包，以確認它能吃。

6.title: Get Well Soon
6.passage: Jason was very ill with the flu. He was so sick that his doctor admitted him into the hospital. The nurses came in to check on him every hour or so. They took his temperature and checked his pulse. They even hooked him up to an IV. After a few days, he was feeling better and went home.
6.translation: 傑森得了流行性感冒病得很嚴重。因為他病情太重，所以他的醫生安排他住進醫院。護士大約每小時就進來確認他的狀況。她們為他量體溫，並檢查他的脈搏，甚至為他打點滴。幾天之後，他感覺比較好了，然後就回家去了。

advanced.eg: The hospital bed was small and hard.
advanced.eg_zh: 醫院的病床又小又硬。

advanced.eg: He shared his room with another young patient.
advanced.eg_zh: 他和另一個年輕的病患共用一間病房。

advanced.eg: If you are really sick or injured, you can go to the emergency room.
advanced.eg_zh: 如果你病得很重或受傷，你可以去急診室就醫。

advanced.eg: He had to take pills three times a day before meals.
advanced.eg_zh: 他必須在三餐飯前吃藥。

advanced.eg: The medicine helped him to get better faster.
advanced.eg_zh: 這服藥讓他康復得更快。

6.title: Board Games
6.passage: Josh and his friends like to play board games. He thinks they are much more fun than video games. His favorite game is Monopoly. The idea of the game is to buy property and make money. You make money when another player lands on a space that you own. The winner is whoever makes the most money.
6.translation: 喬許和他的朋友喜歡玩棋盤遊戲，他覺得棋盤遊戲比電動玩具有趣多了。他最喜歡的遊戲是大富翁。這個遊戲的概念是買房地產和賺錢。當別的玩家停在你擁有的土地時，你可以賺錢。賺最多錢的就是贏家。

advanced.eg: Roll the die to see how many spaces to move.
advanced.eg_zh: 擲骰子來決定移動幾步。

advanced.eg: You draw one of the cards in the middle if you land on a special square.
advanced.eg_zh: 當你跳到一個特殊的小方格，你就在抽出中間的一張卡。

advanced.eg: The rulebook tells you how to play.
advanced.eg_zh: 規則手冊告知你遊戲怎麼玩。

advanced.eg: Each player gets their own colored game piece.
advanced.eg_zh: 每個玩家都能得到自己的彩色棋子。

advanced.eg: You have to roll doubles to get out of jail.
advanced.eg_zh: 你必須擲出同點數才能出獄。

6.title: Paper, Scissors, Stone!
6.passage: These cute little girls have a problem. They can’t figure out whose turn it is to sweep the driveway. They have decided to use an old game to solve their problem. It’s called Paper, Scissors, Stone (or rock). Jill wins the first round of the best two out of three. Pamela wins the second. The final and deciding round goes to Pamela. Her stone beats Jill’s scissors.
6.translation: 這兩個可愛小女孩有一個問題。他們想不出是輪到誰要掃車道。她們決定用一個古老的遊戲來解決她們的問題。這遊戲叫做剪刀、石頭、布。三戰兩勝中吉兒贏得第一次。帕梅拉贏得第二次。最後決定性的那一次是帕梅拉獲勝。她的石頭打敗吉兒的布。

advanced.eg: Paper covers stone.
advanced.eg_zh: 紙包石頭(布贏石頭)。

advanced.eg: Scissors cut paper.
advanced.eg_zh: 剪刀剪紙(剪刀贏布)。

advanced.eg: Stone smashes the scissors.
advanced.eg_zh: 石頭搗毀剪刀(石頭贏剪刀)。

advanced.eg: They pump their fists five times while chanting “Paper, Scissors, Stone!”
advanced.eg_zh: 他們喊剪刀、石頭、布時，拳頭來回擺動五次!

advanced.eg: If both show the same thing, it’s a tie and they do it again.
advanced.eg_zh: 如果雙方出相同的東西，那就是平手，要再比一次。

6.title: Cleaning Your Ears
6.passage: Calvin is cleaning his ears with a cotton swab. He carefully inserts the swab into his ear and swipes the sides of the ear canal. He pulls it out and it is covered in stinky earwax. Then he turns the swab over and uses the clean end to do it one more time. After that he can get another swab to do the other ear.
6.translation: 卡爾文正使用棉花棒清他的耳朵。他小心翼翼地把棉花棒伸到他的耳朵，然後抹擦耳道的兩側。他把棉花棒抽出來，上面充滿了臭耳垢。接著他把棉花棒調過來，使用乾淨的那一端再清一次。之後，他可以再拿另一支棉花棒清另一側的耳朵。

advanced.eg: Cotton swabs are commonly called Q-Tips.
advanced.eg_zh: 棉花棒通常被稱為Q-Tips。

advanced.eg: Sticking the Q-Tip in too far can damage your ear.
advanced.eg_zh: 棉花棒伸得太進去會傷害你的耳朵。

advanced.eg: You can also use cotton swabs to clean wounds.
advanced.eg_zh: 你也可以使用棉花棒清潔傷口。

advanced.eg: Your body naturally pushes out earwax.
advanced.eg_zh: 你的身體會自然地排出耳垢。

advanced.eg: Earwax is sticky and prevents dirt from getting too far into your ear.
advanced.eg_zh: 耳垢是粘性的，可以預防塵埃進入耳朵太深的地方。

6.title: Reading the Paper
6.passage: Luke enjoys reading the newspaper every day after lunch. It helps to keep him up-to-date on current events around the world. He usually reads the headlines first to see what the day’s top stories are. After that he turns to the entertainment section to catch up on the latest celebrity gossip.
6.translation: 路克喜歡每天午餐後看報紙，這有助於他瞭解世界上正發生的時事。他通常都先讀頭條新聞，看看當天的頭條新聞是什麼。之後，他會翻開娛樂版，瞭解最近名人的八卦消息。

advanced.eg: The sports section contains current sport news and scores.
advanced.eg_zh: 體育版包含了現今的運動新聞及比數。

advanced.eg: The financial section has articles related to business and money.
advanced.eg_zh: 財經版有關於商業及財務的文章。

advanced.eg: The weather report gives you the day’s forecast.
advanced.eg_zh: 氣象報告提供給你當天的天氣預報。

advanced.eg: Did you read the movie review for Avatar?
advanced.eg_zh: 你看過阿凡達的電影評論了嗎?

advanced.eg: Most newspapers give you your daily horoscope.
advanced.eg_zh: 大多數的報紙會提供你每日的星座運勢。

6.title: Tae Kwon Do
6.passage: Al recently got to show off his Tae Kwon Do skills at school. His Tae Kwon Do class gave a performance there during lunchtime. They wore the traditional white suit that is common in the sport. They did a few moves that required a lot of skill. The crowd was very impressed with the high, precise kicks that they could do.
6.translation: 艾爾最近有機會在學校表演他的跆拳道功夫。在午餐時間，他和學跆拳道的全班同學做演出。他們穿著在這項運動中常見的白色道服。他們做了一些需要高度技巧的動作。觀眾對他們能夠做出高且精準的飛踢留下相當深刻的印象。

advanced.eg: Karate is another kind of martial art.
advanced.eg_zh: 空手道是另一種的武術。

advanced.eg: Al’s punches were as fast as lightening.
advanced.eg_zh: 艾爾出拳就像閃電般的快。

advanced.eg: They broke boards with their fists.
advanced.eg_zh: 他們用他們的拳頭擊破木板。

advanced.eg: Tae Kwon do is a form of self-defense, too.
advanced.eg_zh: 跆拳道也是一種自衛的形式。

advanced.eg: Colored belts are used to show the students’ level.
advanced.eg_zh: 腰帶的顏色用來顯示出學生的級數。

6.title: Final Boarding Call
6.passage: Connie looks at the bus schedule and sees that it is almost time to board. She quickly walks to the ticket booth and buys one ticket for Pitou. The bus is already outside the bus station at the boarding area. Connie hurries to the blue gates to board the bus. She is just in time. The final boarding call has just been announced.
6.translation: 康妮看著公車時刻表，然後發現差不多該上車了。她快速地走到售票亭，並且買一張到埤頭的票。公車已經在車站外的候車區了，康妮趕緊到藍色登車門去搭公車。她及時趕到。最後的登車廣播剛播報。

advanced.eg: Her final destination is Pitou.
advanced.eg_zh: 她的最終目的地是埤頭。

advanced.eg: The departure time will be in 30 minutes.
advanced.eg_zh: 在30分鐘後將會出發。

advanced.eg: Mom, I need money for bus fare.
advanced.eg_zh: 媽，我需要坐公車的錢。

advanced.eg: Carry-on bags should be stowed under your seat.
advanced.eg_zh: 隨身攜帶的行李應放在座位下。

advanced.eg: Heavy luggage should be given to the bus driver to load.
advanced.eg_zh: 厚重的行李應該交由公車司機來裝載。

6.title: The Carwash
6.passage: Delores works at a carwash. Every day customers drop their cars off to be washed. First, Delores cleans the interior of the car. She vacuums the seats and floor then wipes down the dash. Next she washes the exterior with a pressure washer. The last thing to be done is to wash the windows.
6.translation: 多洛麗絲在洗車場工作。每一天顧客將他們的車開來送洗。首先，多洛麗絲會清理車子的內部。她用真空吸塵器幫座位和地板吸塵，然後再擦拭儀表板。接著她會用高壓清洗機來清洗外部，最後要做的是清洗窗戶。

advanced.eg: The floor mats need to be shaken off.
advanced.eg_zh: 這個腳踏墊需要抖一抖。

advanced.eg: The instrument panel has to be cleaned as well.
advanced.eg_zh: 這個儀表板也必須清洗一下。

advanced.eg: Waxing and polishing is extra.
advanced.eg_zh: 打蠟跟磨光都是附加的。

advanced.eg: She rinses off the undercarriage.
advanced.eg_zh: 她用水沖洗汽車的底盤。

advanced.eg: She lifts up the windshield wipers to clean the windshield.
advanced.eg_zh: 她立起雨刷來清洗擋風玻璃。

6.title: Playing Pool
6.passage: Larry loves spending his free time shooting pool. In fact, if he is not in his room studying or at school, chances are that he is at the neighborhood pool hall. He is not the best pool player in the world, but he can beat most of his friends.
6.translation: 賴里喜歡在他的空閒時間裡打撞球。其實上，如果他不是待在他的房間裡讀書或是待在學校，那他很可能就是在他們社區的撞球房。他並不是世界上最厲害的撞球選手，不過，他倒是可以打敗他大部分的朋友。

advanced.eg: The cue ball is the white ball that you hit.
advanced.eg_zh: 母球就是撞球臺上的白色球。

advanced.eg: A pool cue is what you hit the cue ball with.
advanced.eg_zh: 撞球桿就是你用來打母球用的球桿。

advanced.zh: 巧克；白堊(塗在桿梢上防滑)
advanced.eg: Chalk is rubbed on the end of the cue so that the cue doesn’t slip off the cue ball when you hit it.
advanced.eg_zh: 巧克被用來塗在桿梢，這樣打母球時球桿才不會滑掉。

advanced.eg: Pools tables are covered in green felt and have rubber rails along the edge.
advanced.eg_zh: 撞球桌上鋪綠色的毛氈布，而且邊緣有橡膠圍欄。

advanced.eg: There are six pockets on a pool table.
advanced.eg_zh: 一張撞球桌上有六個球袋。
